# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: NetworkSecurityGroup
    type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01
    location: $currentLocation
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: AllowRDPInbound
          description: Allows inbound RDP traffic from any source.
          protocol: Tcp
          sourceAddressPrefix: 0.0.0.0/0
          sourcePortRange: *
          destinationAddressPrefix: $currentVMIP
          destinationPortRange: 3389
          access: Allow
        - name: AllowSSHInbound
          description: Allows inbound SSH traffic from any source.
          protocol: Tcp
          sourceAddressPrefix: 0.0.0.0/0
          sourcePortRange: *
          destinationAddressPrefix: $currentVMIP
          destinationPortRange: 22
          access: Allow
        - name: AllowHTTPInbound
          description: Allows inbound HTTP traffic from any source.
          protocol: Tcp
          sourceAddressPrefix: 0.0.0.0/0
          sourcePortRange: *
          destinationAddressPrefix: $currentVMIP
          destinationPortRange: 80
          access: Allow
        - name: AllowHTTPSInbound
          description: Allows inbound HTTPS traffic from any source.
          protocol: Tcp
          sourceAddressPrefix: 0.0.0.0/0
          sourcePortRange: *
          destinationAddressPrefix: $currentVMIP
          destinationPortRange: 443
          access: Allow
